Current Context:
- CV/project summaries guidelines and templates are now active constraints for presenting short project summaries on a CV; aim to be impact-first, scannable, and link-rich; limit to 3 items in a “Selected Projects” section near the top; each project 1–2 lines, ~40–50 words total; include date, role, impact metric, tech scope, and a link to a repo/demo or short case study; use a consistent date format; do not exceed two technical details; reference a longer case study or portfolio for details; provide one or two example rewrites if asked; use inline links when space is tight.
- Pivot toward product strategy: top 3 high-impact artifacts to build first: 1) One-page strategy memo (market/opportunity + recommendation) with problem statement, market/context, target user, 2–3 options, recommended option
